No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to eradicating poverty or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to health, well-being, or related targets.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fosters cultural diversity appreciation by studying various global writing systems, enhancing international perspective (Target 4.7).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course's focus on deciphering ancient scripts (e.g., oracle bone, Sumerian) directly contributes to safeguarding the world's cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to sustainable consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: Studying ancient natural phenomena is too tangential to modern climate action, mitigation, or adaptation efforts to warrant a score.
evidence: 甲骨文中的自然現象與災異觀

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: Studying ancient creatures in characters is a very weak link to biodiversity conservation or terrestrial ecosystem protection.
